name: Tianrong Medical Group Inc.
summary: Tianrong Medical Group Inc. comprises of two business units namely HealthySite PLC and personal electro cardiogram monitor unit. Healthysite PLC owns and operates a subscription-based online portal www.healthysite.com that provides information about fitness programs. Tianrong Medical Group also develops and offers electro cardiogram monitoring devices. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in New York, New York. Tianrong Medical Group Inc. operates as a subsidiary of Tianrong Building Material Holdings, Ltd.
